---
title: "rich-supervision-multitask-740 — notes"
format: html
---

# Running notes

Placeholders. Populate after the full run.

## Per-ablation metrics

- `metrics_win_only_sanity.json` — sanity replication of cleanup-740 on the rich-cols pipeline.
- `metrics_multitask_all.json` — PRIMARY 4-head joint training.
- `metrics.json` — copy of the primary file.

## Vocab inspection

- `results/item_vocab.json` — observed vocab size, frequency cutoff, top items, duration bucket edges.

## Plots

- `results/learning_curve_*.png` — per-component train/val loss + val_auc curves.
- `results/calibration_*.png` — win-head 20-quantile calibration.
- `results/roc_*.png` — win-head ROC.
